dialogueChunks.intro: The truth about {quest_focus} is finally out, and it's cleared the air between both sides. The real culprit wasn't who anyone expected.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} and {target_npc} have sat down together for the first time in weeks. {quest_stakes} are intact because you had the patience to uncover the truth rather than pick a side. The {enemy_type} lost their best weapon: our division.
dialogueChunks.outro: Both settlements owe you a debt, {player_name}. You kept {quest_threat} from consuming an alliance that neither side could afford to lose.

playerResponses.text: Stay vigilant. Trust takes time to rebuild.

dialogueChunks.intro: The fighting has stopped, but the wounds from {quest_focus} haven't fully healed. Both sides agreed to stand down, at least for now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} says the truce is fragile. {target_npc} seems willing to move forward, but there are people on both sides who still harbor grudges. At least {quest_threat} has been contained to words rather than weapons.
dialogueChunks.outro: It's not the clean resolution anyone wanted, but {quest_stakes} survived. Sometimes that's the best you can ask for, {player_name}.

playerResponses.text: An uneasy peace beats open war.
Time will tell if it holds.

dialogueChunks.intro: Something unexpected came from this crisis. The struggle over {quest_focus} forced both settlements to confront problems they'd been avoiding for years.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} proposed a new joint arrangement that addresses the root causes of {quest_threat}. {quest_ally} is cautiously optimistic. The {enemy_type} threat that exploited the rift has been driven back, and {quest_stakes} are stronger for having been tested.
dialogueChunks.outro: You didn't just prevent a conflict, {player_name}: you built something better from the wreckage. Both settlements will remember your name.

playerResponses.text: Glad something good came from this.
Hold each other accountable this time.
